scripts.db:generate: npm run db:sync-provider && npm run generate -w @fosl/db
scripts.db:push: npm run db:sync-provider && npm run push -w @fosl/db
scripts.db:migrate: npm run db:sync-provider && npm run migrate:dev -w @fosl/db
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: npm run db:sync-provider && npm run migrate:deploy -w @fosl/db
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:up && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
